recommendations.title: Acts of Vengeance
recommendations.overview: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

recommendations.title: Close Range
recommendations.overview: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff, his obedient deputies, and a dangerous drug cartel in order to protect his sister and her young daughter.

recommendations.title: The Shepherd: Border Patrol
recommendations.overview: A Texas cop battles ex-navy seals who are trying to traffic drugs from Mexico into the USA.

recommendations.title: Ninja
recommendations.overview: A westerner named Casey, studying Ninjutsu in Japan, is asked by the Sensei to return to New York to protect the legendary Yoroi Bitsu, an armored chest that contains the weapons of the last Koga Ninja.

recommendations.title: Undisputed II: Last Man Standing
recommendations.overview: Heavyweight Champ George "Iceman" Chambers is sent to a Russian jail on trumped-up drug charges. In order to win his freedom he must fight against the jailhouse fighting champ Uri Boyka in a battle to the death. This time he is not fighting for a tit

recommendations.title: Undisputed III: Redemption
recommendations.overview: Russian inmate Boyka, now severely hobbled by the knee injury suffered at the end of Undisputed 2. No longer the feared prison fighter he was, he has declined so far that he is now good only for cleaning toilets. But when a new prison fight tournamen

recommendations.title: Seized
recommendations.overview: Hiding out with his son Taylor on the Mexican coast, Nero hopes to put his violent Special Forces career behind him. But after Nero’s home is attacked and Taylor is abducted, the mysterious Mzamo orders Nero to slaughter the members of three rival cr

recommendations.title: Ninja: Shadow of a Tear
recommendations.overview: Fight everyone and trust no one: it's the code of survival practiced by martial-arts master Casey Bowman after his life of domestic bliss is shattered by a savage act of violence. Vowing revenge, the fearless American stealthily tracks the killer fro

recommendations.title: The Paper Tigers
recommendations.overview: Three middle aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.

recommendations.title: To All the Boys I've Loved Before
recommendations.overview: Lara Jean's love life goes from imaginary to out of control when her secret letters to every boy she's ever fallen for are mysteriously mailed out.
